action_set_definitions.name: find_failed_lab_result
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the lab_test_results database to identify the unique Batch ID that failed safety inspections.

action_set_definitions.name: get_shipment_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves all recorded movements for a specific batch ID from the shipment_logs.

batch_id.description: The unique ID of the batch to trace.

action_set_definitions.name: get_node_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the metadata for a specific supply chain node, including its classification (e.g., Farm, RDC, Retailer).

node_id.description: The ID of the node to look up.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_audit_report
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current inventory and sales metrics for a specific batch across the retail network, including physical counts, system-recorded counts, and units already sold.

batch_id.description: The unique ID of the batch being audited.

state_description.batch_registry: A mapping of unique Batch IDs to their metadata (e.g., product name, origin_node_id, production_date).
state_description.supply_chain_nodes: Details of entities in the chain (Farms, Processing Plants, Distribution Centers, Retailers) including their locations and current inventory.
state_description.shipment_logs: A chronological record of batch movements between nodes, including timestamps and carrier info.
state_description.lab_test_results: Safety inspection records containing Batch IDs, tested contaminants (e.g., E. coli, Salmonella), and pass/fail status.
state_description.active_recalls: A list of Batch IDs currently under an official recall order.

lab_test_results.notes: Positive culture detected in sample C-4.
